Past Events

Past Events

Events in 2025

  • 16 Nov 2025 – Christmas Preview night at Cadbury Garden Centre.
  • 14 Oct 2025 – South Wales Big Band Society
  • 21 July 2025 – Nailsea & Backwell Beer & Cider Festival.
  • 4 July 2025 – Swing in the Park – Thornbury Carnival.
  • 17 June 2025 – South Wales Big Band Society
  • 10 May 2025 – TSB Small Band Oldbury on Severn
  • 10 May 2025 – Keynsham VE Day Celebration
  • 22 March 2025 – Armstrong Arts Group

Events in 2024

  • 12 Dec 2024 – Christmas party at Almondsbury Creative.
  • 20 July 2024 – Nailsea & Backwell Beer & Cider Festival.
  • 5 July 2024 – ‘Swing in the Park’ at Thornbury Carnival.
  • 10 May 2024 – VE Dance in aid of Holly Hedge Animal Sanctuary.

Just wanted to thank you ALL so much for the magnificent repertoire at our VE Day Swing for Victory event at Clevedon Princes Hall. It was a great success and so much fun! — Event organiser

Events in 2023

  • 14 December 2023 – Christmas Dance (full Thornbury Swing Band) at Almondsbury Creative.
  • 5 August 2023 – The Big Band: Private wedding, Haresfield, Glos.

Thank you Chris for a beautiful performance, absolutely the best night of our lives!! We hope to see you again soon. — Bride & Groom

  • 30 June 2023 – ‘Swing in the Park’, Thornbury Carnival.
  • 12 May 2023 – VE Day Dance (full band) at Clevedon Community Hall, in aid of Holly Hedge Animal Sanctuary.

Just wanted to say a HUGE thank you to each and every one of you for the fantastic evening… — Event organiser

  • 6 May 2023 – The Small Band: Coronation Party, Oldbury.

I thought your band were terrific – well everyone did. It was a great evening! — Audience member

  • 25 March 2023 – Thornbury Jazz Festival (full band), Marlwood School, Alveston.
